title_ja: 夜のホテル・ベッドサイド・レースルームウェア・iPhone風
title_en: Night luxury hotel bed, black lace loungewear set, warm lamp, iPhone candid 9:16
reference_note: Adapted from user brief for riamero: fictional character only (no real celebrity). Full matching two-piece lace set; editorial lifestyle framing, not explicit anatomy checklist. English: prompt_en.md.

subject.description: Young woman seated on a messy hotel bed at night, warm bedside light, black lace loungewear, gentle smile toward camera, casual iPhone-style candid vertical shot — not a mirror selfie.

mouth.position: Lips gently closed, faint relaxed smile

expression.overall: Playful yet composed, intimate confidence, approachable private moment

face.note_when_no_reference: Delicate proportions; natural dewy K-beauty-inspired makeup: light blush, glossy MLBB lips, clear skin without moles or freckles

hair.color: Dark honey blonde to light brown
hair.style: Shoulder-length messy layers, airy wispy bangs, slightly uneven ends
hair.effect: Fine flyaways catching warm side light, late-night realistic texture

body.chest: Natural proportions, fitted by lace top
body.legs: Partially visible where in frame, relaxed seated pose

skin.visible_areas: Face, neck, shoulders, arms, midriff as framed by clothing edges
skin.texture: Smooth natural skin with subtle variation; clear without moles or freckles
skin.lighting_effect: Bedside warm lamp: creamy highlights and soft shadows on shoulders, neck, torso; natural falloff

pose.position: Sitting on white hotel bedding, body slightly angled
pose.base: Relaxed seated posture, one hand may rest near tie or strap naturally
pose.overall: Casual intimate snapshot, slight head tilt, off-center candid framing

layered_from_skin_outward: Black floral lace bralette-style top with thin shoulder straps and soft front tie detail, fitted but tasteful coverage for editorial lifestyle
Matching black lace high-cut briefs or short tap-pants, same set — both visible as a coordinated loungewear look, not nude lower body

accessories.jewelry: Minimal or none unless in reference
accessories.device: Smartphone visible in hand or at edge of frame optional; warm screen glow on fingers if held

photography.camera_style: Smartphone straight-out-camera lifestyle feel, vertical social post mood
photography.angle: Slightly low front viewpoint, handheld intimacy
photography.shot_type: Medium close-up to three-quarter, torso and context visible, 9:16 vertical
photography.texture: Subtle grain, natural sharpness, believable noise in shadows
photography.lighting: Warm dim bedside lamp, soft pools of light, no hard flash
photography.depth_of_field: Shallow to moderate; subject clear, background bedding and furniture soft

background.setting: Nighttime upscale hotel bedroom, European-leaning decor
background.wall_color: Muted low-saturation walls, walnut wood furniture accents
elements: Bedside surface with a few personal items, not cluttered
background.lighting: Low-key warm tungsten-like pools, deeper shadows in corners

the_vibe.aesthetic: Natural dewy beauty, candid phone photo, imperfect framing OK
the_vibe.authenticity: Lived-in bedding, stray hairs, casual asymmetry
the_vibe.story: Winding down on the bed before sleep, quick candid toward camera

must_keep: Fictional character, not a real celebrity likeness
Coordinated black lace two-piece loungewear (top and bottom both present)
Messy shoulder-length hair with wispy bangs per reference or brief
avoid_as_positive_style: Not hard on-camera flash as main key
Not nudity or missing lower garment
Not deformed hands or extra fingers
